creator: mats@dufberg.se
text:
Installation of security/php5-filter fails even though php is updated. It is installed as php5-5.3.2_1.

Installation was done as a clean install, i.e. php and every ports dependent on it was removed. Then devel/pcre (pcre-8.02) was reinstalled and then php and sup-ports were installed from scratch. 

Everything except php5-filter and php5-extensions (requires php5-filters) succeded.
